title: Fish and Game Wardens
description: Patrol assigned area to prevent fish and game law violations. Investigate reports of damage to crops or property by wildlife. Compile biological data.

tasks.text: Patrol assigned areas by car, boat, airplane, horse, or on foot to enforce game, fish, or boating laws or to manage wildlife programs, lakes, or land.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile and present evidence for court actions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate hunting accidents or reports of fish or game law violations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Protect and preserve native wildlife, plants, or ecosystems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue warnings or citations and file reports as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve warrants and make arrests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to other local law enforcement agencies as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Promote or provide hunter or trapper safety training.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in search-and-rescue operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for disposition of fish or game illegally taken or possessed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Seize equipment used in fish and game law violations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Address schools, civic groups, sporting clubs, or the media to disseminate information concerning wildlife conservation and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend revisions in hunting and trapping regulations or in animal management programs so that wildlife balances or habitats can be maintained.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect commercial operations relating to fish or wildlife, recreation, or protected areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Survey areas and compile figures of bag counts of hunters to determine the effectiveness of control measures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect and report information on populations or conditions of fish and wildlife in their habitats, availability of game food or cover, or suspected pollution.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design or implement control measures to prevent or counteract damage caused by wildlife or people.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide advice or information to park or reserve visitors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate crop, property, or habitat damage or destruction or instances of water pollution to determine causes and to advise property owners of preventive measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue licenses, permits, or other documentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document the extent of crop, property, or habitat damage and make financial loss estimates or compensation recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise the activities of seasonal workers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform facilities maintenance work, such as constructing or repairing structures or controlling weeds or pests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in firefighting efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
